# qbuem-stack

> Zero Latency · Zero Allocation · Zero Dependency — High-performance C++20 infrastructure library for WAS, IPC, and data pipelines. v2.1.0.

`qbuem-stack` is a header-centric C++20 library targeting ultra-low latency server workloads. It provides:
- **Zero-allocation HTTP/WAS** layer built on `io_uring`/`kqueue` with SIMD parsers
- **StaticPipeline / DynamicPipeline** — type-safe, compile-time and runtime-configurable data processing chains
- **SHMChannel<T> / SHMBus** — shared-memory lock-free ring buffers for sub-150 ns inter-process communication
- **MessageBus** — in-process lock-free topic pub/sub with round-robin fan-out
- **Resilience triad** — RetryAction + CircuitBreaker + DeadLetterQueue with exponential/jitter backoff
- **W3C TraceContext / OTLP spans** — distributed tracing without external SDK dependency

Single umbrella header: `#include <qbuem/qbuem_stack.hpp>`

## Core Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, quick start, feature matrix, benchmarks
- [Pipeline Master Guide](docs/pipeline-master-guide.md): Complete reference for StaticPipeline, DynamicPipeline, PipelineGraph, IPC adapters (SHMSource, SHMSink, MessageBusSource, MessageBusSink), and all design patterns
- [SHM Messaging](docs/shm-messaging.md): Sub-microsecond IPC — SHMChannel, SHMBus, producer/consumer patterns, pipeline bridge adapters
- [Library Strategy](docs/library-strategy.md): 9-level modular CMake build, FetchContent integration, compile-time feature flags
- [Strategic Evaluation](docs/strategic-evaluation.md): Why qbuem-stack unifies WAS + IPC + ML inference pipelines
- [Versatility Guide](docs/versatility-guide.md): Use cases — AI/NPU inference, FinTech HFT, Media Streaming, Edge Computing
- [DB Abstraction](docs/db-abstraction.md): Zero-allocation database driver interface and coroutine session model
- [IO Architecture](docs/io-architecture.md): io_uring / kqueue event loop internals
- [Security & TLS](docs/security-tls.md): kTLS offload, SIMD JWT, JwtAuthAction middleware
- [Windows Support](docs/windows-support.md): IOCP integration and Win32 alignment roadmap

## Examples Index

- [Examples Overview](examples/README.md): All 44 examples organized into 11 categories with build instructions and learning paths

### Category Quicklinks

- [01 Foundation](examples/01-foundation/hello_world/README.md): hello_world, async_timer — minimal start
- [02 Network](examples/02-network/tcp_echo_server/README.md): TCP echo, UDP, Unix socket, WebSocket
- [03 Memory](examples/03-memory/arena/README.md): Arena allocator, zero-copy, NUMA + huge pages
- [04 Codec & Security](examples/04-codec-security/codec/README.md): Codecs, HMAC/crypto, JWT middleware
- [05 Pipeline](examples/05-pipeline/fanout/README.md): Fan-out, hot-swap, hardware batching, sensor fusion, windowed processing
- [06 IPC & Messaging](examples/06-ipc-messaging/ipc_pipeline/README.md): SHMChannel, flagship IPC pipeline, MessageBus, priority SPSC
- [07 Resilience](examples/07-resilience/resilience/README.md): Retry+CircuitBreaker+DLQ, Saga, Canary, Checkpoint, SLO
- [08 Observability](examples/08-observability/tracing/README.md): W3C tracing, TimerWheel, TaskGroup structured concurrency
- [09 Database](examples/09-database/db_session/README.md): Connection pool, session store, coroutine JSON
- [10 Hardware](examples/10-hardware/hardware_io/README.md): PCIe VFIO, RDMA, eBPF, NVMe/SPDK, kTLS, kqueue
- [11 Advanced Apps](examples/11-advanced-apps/trading_platform/README.md): HFT trading platform, autonomous driving, game server, I/O dashboard

## API Reference

- [Public Headers](include/qbuem/): All public C++20 headers — umbrella at `qbuem_stack.hpp`
- [Doxyfile](Doxyfile): Doxygen config — generates HTML to `docs/api/`

## Build & Test

- [Root CMakeLists.txt](CMakeLists.txt): Top-level build — C++20, optional qbuem-json via FetchContent
- [Examples CMakeLists.txt](examples/CMakeLists.txt): All 44 example targets with category grouping
